/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o "RBFinalLeveler_artefacts/Release/VST3/RB Final Leveler.vst3/Contents/MacOS/RB Final Leveler" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/RBFinalLeveler_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o"  "RBFinalLeveler_artefacts/Release/libRB Final Leveler_SharedCode.a" -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework QuartzCore -framework Accelerate -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security
